info.title: METHEAN
info.description: Learning governance operating system for homeschool families

Response List Templates Api V1 Learning Maps Templates Get
Response List Learning Maps Api V1 Learning Maps Get

post.description: Process all map changes in a single transaction.

schema.title: Response Batch Update Api V1 Learning Maps  Map Id  Batch Post

post.description: Map an existing curriculum into METHEAN's DAG structure.

post.description: Apply an approved curriculum mapping: create map, nodes, mastery state.

post.description: Trigger content enrichment for all unenriched nodes in the map.

get.description: Full state across all enrolled maps: every node with mastery, FSRS data.
StateEvent stream for one node, chronological.

get.description: Aggregate retention summary: counts and average retrievability.

post.description: Start a new attempt for an activity.

put.description: Submit an attempt, triggering the evaluation pipeline.

Response Delete Governance Rule Api V1 Governance Rules  Rule Id  Delete

post.description: Generate a comprehensive governance report for the period.

schema.title: Response Generate Report Api V1 Governance Report Post

post.description:
Parent's digital signature on a governance report.

Creates an immutable governance event as attestation. This is the
authoritative document — not any AI summary.

schema.title: Response Attest Report Api V1 Governance Report Attest Post

get.description: Rules with future trigger conditions that haven't fired yet.
